# MehulxDesign

> A curated collection of interface, landing-page, brand, and product design work by Mehul Prajapati.

## Main page

- [Selected designs](https://design.mehulxbuilds.in/): Browse Mehul's published design portfolio and project descriptions.

## About

Mehul Prajapati is a designer and developer helping startups turn visitors into loyal customers through visual design, product thinking, and development.
